name: multi_claim_narrative_similarity
description: Detect coordinated fraud across large document sets by searching past claims for similar narratives.

name: internal_fraud_communication_audit
description: Uncover insider threats in support tickets, email logs, or employee chat systems.

name: adaptive_fraud_profile_generation
description: Model evolving fraud patterns tied to individual users or accounts.

name: regulatory_compliance_cross_validation
description: Verify that customer statements or reports meet compliance standards.

name: real_time_financial_scam_detector
description: Monitor live chats or support emails for scam indicators.

name: document_consistency_checker
description: Verify that all components of large submissions are internally consistent.

name: multilingual_fraud_detection
description: Detect suspicious text across multiple languages and regions.

name: synthetic_document_detection
description: Identify AI-generated or machine-altered text submissions.

name: time_lag_deception_analysis
description: Spot time-based inconsistencies in a user's reports.

name: high_risk_customer_alert
description: Aggregate user behavior into a risk score based on linguistic indicators.

name: suspicious_language_detector
description: Analyze text for deceptive or overly formal language indicating fraud.
template:
Analyze the following text for signs of deceptive or overly formal language that may indicate fraud. Highlight phrases that stand out as suspicious and explain why.
Input: {input_text}

name: style_inconsistency_checker
description: Compare writing style of two texts to identify different authors or fabrication.

name: semantic_duplicate_finder
description: Flag text if it is semantically similar to known prior entries.
template:
Evaluate this text and flag it if it is semantically similar to known prior entries. Use similarity scoring and explain your confidence level.
Input: {input_text}

name: unusual_entity_detector
description: Extract named entities and check against flagged records.
template:
Extract all named entities (people, addresses, emails, companies) from this text and check if any are unusually repeated or associated with flagged entries in previous records.
Input: {input_text}

name: emotional_manipulation_identifier
description: Detect signs of emotional manipulation (urgency, fear, guilt).
template:
Does this text contain signs of emotional manipulation (urgency, fear, guilt)? Rate the emotional tone and highlight any concerning language.
Input: {input_text}
